decisions.decision: Move isOptional toggle from DSpec edit dialog to inline row checkbox
decisions.rationale: isOptional is a junction column on modelcatalog_configuration_input (config<->dspec binding), not a property of the DSpec entity. PUT /datasetspecifications/{id} cannot persist it: API has no configuration context to pick which junction row to update. The junction column only writes via the parent ModelConfiguration nested-write path (resource-registry.ts:215 junctionColumns + service.ts:251 update() delete-then-insert). Forcing the user to save via Configuration triggers the right code path.

Generated v1.8.0 client strips isOptional. Patching via src/model-catalog-api/sdk-patches.ts wired from model-catalog-api.ts is fast and unblocks dev. Long-term fix is to publish a new SDK release (prompt drafted and copied to clipboard for the modelcatalog_client repo).

decisions.decision: Move all phase 12 feature work off main onto gsd/phase-12-is-optional in superproject AND every modified submodule
decisions.rationale: User correction mid-session: never commit features on main. Cerebrum updated 2026-04-27.

decisions.decision: Pin ui image by full commit SHA, not branch tag
decisions.rationale: Docker tag spec forbids '/'; branch name has slash. SHA is unambiguous and immutable.

decisions.decision: Widen ui docker-publish.yml push trigger from '*' to '**' and sanitize SAFE_BRANCH (replace / with -)
decisions.rationale: '*' glob does not match slashed branch names -- original workflow never triggered for gsd/* branches.

decisions.decision: continue-on-error: true on Trivy security scan job
decisions.rationale: Existing dependabot vulns were failing the workflow and blocking image publish. User explicitly requested allow-fail.

Add a debug log in service.ts update() junctionParts construction to confirm the hasInput branch fires with the expected items array (camelKey 'isOptional' → snake colName 'is_optional'). 7) If pass: write 12-05-SUMMARY.md, run roadmap.update-plan-progress 12 12-05 complete, then phase verification.
context_notes: Three sequential bug fixes landed this session on plan 12-05: (a) SDK strips isOptional in PUT body (fixed via sdk-patches.ts monkey-patch, commit d8caed2); (b) UI was firing PUT /datasetspecifications which cannot reach junction (fixed by moving toggle to inline row checkbox, commit 854fa75 -- forces save via parent ModelConfiguration PUT); (c) STILL OUTSTANDING: PUT /modelconfigurations/{id} returns HTTP 200 with hasInput[].isOptional:true in body but Hasura junction row stays is_optional=false. Two hypotheses remain: (i) helm hadn't rolled the new ui image so the test ran the old UI which fired DSpec PUT only -- helm upgrade + retest will resolve; (ii) API path (response.ts mapper or service.ts update()) silently drops is_optional during the junction insert. Verify (i) first by helm upgrade + retest. If still broken, dig into model-catalog-api code path. The CI workflow correctly fired and built each new commit (verified runs 25054108075 success for e0547dd, 25081338313 success for d8caed2, 25082085184 in progress for 854fa75). All 4 prior phase plans (12-01..12-04) complete with SUMMARY.md committed; only 12-05 finalize + phase verification remain.
